claim_risk: A single-split leaderboard can overstate model quality.
expected_evidence_needed: Run top-model verification before allowing a robust best-model claim.
rationale: Fake command backend selected action_verify_top_models from the safe catalog for state state_006.
research_question: Maximize validation accuracy on sklearn digits under a small compute budget, while avoiding unsupported claims.
working_hypothesis: The best observed single-run model may not be robust across matched seeds.
